clauses_raw.clause_text_raw: Development applications in the DMUN Zone are eligible for a Bonus Height.
Applications for a Bonus Height are subject to the following regulations:
A bonus of up to a maximum Building Height of 18.5m (60.7ft).
Lot Dimension Requirements:
Minimum Lot Frontage of 30.0m (98.4ft)
The portion above the base Building that is a bonus in Height shall be:
A minimum 3.0m (9.8ft) Stepback from the base Building.
A minimum 5.5m (18ft) Side Yard Setback or Stepback to ensure adequate separation distances of the upper levels from adjacent properties that may also be eligible for a Height bonus.
A 45-degree angular planes originating from the top of the flank or rear façade of the base Building that faces abutting residential dwellings or within a Downtown Neighbourhood (DN) Zone.
Parking Structures are not eligible for a Bonus Height.
Bonus Height applications are subject to the provisions in the Bonus Height Applications Section of this by-law.
